title: Qlog QUIC Vocabulary Foundation Work Item
summary: Implement the qlog QUIC namespace, connection and path lifecycle events, and version and transport-parameter negotiation events.
planned_changes: Add qlog QUIC namespace constants, schema registration, and typed payload contracts for connection_started, connection_state_updated, connection_closed, tuple_assigned, version_information, alpn_information, parameters_set, and parameters_restored. Keep this slice isolated from packet, stream, migration, and recovery payloads.
out_of_scope: Migration, key lifecycle, recovery, and congestion events.
verification_plan: Run contract tests for namespace and schema registration plus representative snapshots for lifecycle and negotiation payloads.
